overall.description: Cinematic third-person gameplay footage inside a medieval tavern (The Three Broomsticks), featuring warm candlelit interiors with wooden architecture, a character observing the space from the entrance, and NPCs visible on the upper balcony and at dining tables.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval tavern hall with upper balcony and fireplace

events.description: character raises right hand in a gesturing motion toward the upper balcony

agents.ego_description: standing near the tavern entrance observing the interior space, then raising hand in a gesture

notable_agents.action: standing still on the upper wooden balcony overlooking the main hall
seated at dining table near the stone fireplace

entered.detail: carved wooden tavern sign mounted on the upper balcony beam
large stone fireplace with glowing embers at the back of the hall
wooden railings lining the upper floor overlooking the main tavern floor
circular iron chandelier with candles hanging from the ceiling
rustic wooden tables and benches arranged for dining
collection of framed pictures and paintings on the right wall

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a warmly lit medieval tavern with rich wooden architecture. The camera follows a character standing near the entrance, facing a stone fireplace at the far end and an upper balcony where an NPC stands. Wooden dining furniture fills the right side of the frame, and the space is illuminated by candlelight from an iron chandelier. Near the end of the clip, the character raises their hand in a gesture while observing the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a warmly lit medieval tavern, transitioning from a wide observation of the architecture to a focused character interaction. It begins near the entrance, capturing the rich wooden beams and the glow of candlelight emanating from a central iron chandelier. As the camera settles, the view expands to encompass the dining furniture on the right and a distant stone fireplace, while an NPC observes the room from an upper balcony. The scene then shifts focus toward the character in the foreground, who finally raises their hand in a gesture while surveying the atmospheric interior.
